TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: mareḍava kati sa Kidadaw (Qatsiɫay village, p.164)

S.FORM: uzai a mareḍava a maisuisu i vavaw tua qinaɫivan.
S.PHON: uzai a marəɖava a maisuisu i vavaw tua qinaʎivan.
S.FORM: uzai a maredrava a maisuisu i vavaw tua qinaljivan.
S.PHON: uzai a maRəɖava a maisuisu i vavaw tua qinaʎivan.
S.TRANSL: There were women friends pounding grain up on a roof.

S.FORM: manu ɫateku aravats a kalevelevan; saqetju aravats a qadaw.
S.PHON: manu ʎatəku aravaʦ a kaɭəvəɭəvan; saqəcu aravaʦ a qadaw.
S.FORM: manu ljateku aravac a kalevelevan; saqetju aravac a qadaw.
S.PHON: manu ʎatəku aRavaʦ a kaɣəvəɣəvan; saqəʦu aRavaʦ a qadaw.
S.TRANSL: The sky was very low, and the suns’ heat was very painful.

S.FORM: qau maɫavar azua mareḍava: "aku saqetju aravats a qadaw?
S.PHON: qau maʎavar azua marəɖava: "aku saqəcu aravaʦ a qadaw
S.FORM: qau maljavar azua maredrava: "aku saqetju aravac a qadaw?
S.PHON: qau maʎavaR azua maRəɖava: "aku saqəʦu aRavaʦ a qadaw
S.TRANSL: The women said to one another: “Why is the suns’ heat very painful?

S.FORM: paulan tu tja tsektseken tua qaselu," aya matsidiɫ.
S.PHON: pauɭan tu ca ʦəkʦəkən tua qasəɭu," aja maʦidiʎ.
S.FORM: paulan tu tja cekceken tua qaselu," aya macidilj.
S.PHON: pauɣan tu ʦa ʦəkʦəkən tua qasəɣu," aja maʦidiʎ.
S.TRANSL: There’s the danger of our striking them with our pestles,” said one.

S.FORM: mintu sipalut a tsemektsek.
S.PHON: mintu sipaɭut a ʦəməkʦək.
S.FORM: mintu sipalut a cemekcek.
S.PHON: mintu sipaɣut a ʦəməkʦək.
S.TRANSL: Then they really did strike them,

S.FORM: qau mavutsanga a qadaw a ita.
S.PHON: qau mavuʦaŋa a qadaw a ita.
S.FORM: qau mavucanga a qadaw a ita.
S.PHON: qau mavuʦaŋa a qadaw a ita.
S.TRANSL: and one sun went blind.

S.FORM: avan anga azua qiɫas.
S.PHON: avan aŋa azua qiʎas.
S.FORM: avan anga azua qiljas.
S.PHON: avan aŋa azua qiʎas.
S.TRANSL: That is now the moon.

S.FORM: qau tsalugtsug anga a kalevelevan a ɫevavaw.
S.PHON: qau ʦaɭugʦug aŋa a kaɭəvəɭəvan a ʎəvavaw.
S.FORM: qau calugcug anga a kalevelevan a ljevavaw.
S.PHON: qau ʦaɣugʦug aŋa a kaɣəvəɣəvan a ʎəvavaw.
S.TRANSL: And with a bump the sky went up.

S.FORM: manu zemaing ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: manu zəmaiŋ ti sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: manu zemaing ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: manu zəmaiŋ ti sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: Then Kidadaw cried out.

S.FORM: qau marekutj a mareḍava.
S.PHON: qau marəkuc a marəɖava.
S.FORM: qau marekutj a maredrava.
S.PHON: qau maRəkuʦ a maRəɖava.
S.TRANSL: The women friends were afraid,

S.FORM: qau mavilad a mareḍava a sema pasa likuz tua vaqu.
S.PHON: qau maviɭad a marəɖava a səma pasa ɭikuz tua vaqu.
S.FORM: qau mavilad a maredrava a sema pasa likuz tua vaqu.
S.PHON: qau maviɣad a maRəɖava a səma pasa ɣikuz tua vaqu.
S.TRANSL: and ran away and hid behind the millet (store).

S.FORM: ɫakua laingen ni sa Kidadaw; sa djameqi sa patsasavi.
S.PHON: ʎakua ɭaiŋən ni sa kidadaw; sa ɉaməqi sa paʦasavi.
S.FORM: ljakua laingen ni sa Kidadaw; sa djameqi sa pacasavi.
S.PHON: ʎakua ɣaiŋən ni sa kidadaw; sa ɉaməqi sa paʦasavi.
S.TRANSL: But Kidadaw chased them, and caught (one) and brought her outside.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaran ti sa Kidadaw: "qiladju tua tataqan.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaran ti sa kidadaw: "qiɭaɉu tua tataqan.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Kidadaw: "qiladju tua tataqan.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRan ti sa kidadaw: "qiɣaɉu tua tataqan.
S.TRANSL: Kidadaw said: “Sit on the whetstone.

S.FORM: ku tsavulidaw sun," aya ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: ku ʦavuɭidaw sun," aja ti sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: ku cavulidaw sun," aya ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: ku ʦavuɣidaw sun," aja ti sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: I’ll carry you on my shoulder,” he said.

S.FORM: "ini; marekutj aken tua su djui," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: "ini; marəkuc akən tua su ɉui," aja azua vavajan.
S.FORM: "ini; marekutj aken tua su djui," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: "ini; maRəkuʦ akən tua su ɉui," aja azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: “No. I’m afraid of your spikes,” said the woman.

S.FORM: ɫakua pitsipitsen sa paqiladji ni sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: ʎakua piʦipiʦən sa paqiɭaɉi ni sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: ljakua picipicen sa paqiladji ni sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: ʎakua piʦipiʦən sa paqiɣaɉi ni sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: But Kidadaw got hold of her and made her sit down,

S.FORM: sa tsavulidi a pasa tjumaq tua tapaw ni sa Kidadaw, sa puvaɫavi anga.
S.PHON: sa ʦavuɭidi a pasa cumaq tua tapaw ni sa kidadaw, sa puvaʎavi aŋa.
S.FORM: sa cavulidi a pasa tjumaq tua tapaw ni sa Kidadaw, sa puvaljavi anga.
S.PHON: sa ʦavuɣidi a pasa ʦumaq tua tapaw ni sa kidadaw, sa puvaʎavi aŋa.
S.TRANSL: and carried her into his house, and made her his wife.

S.FORM: qau tsuatsuay anga vaik a venateq.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa vaik a vənatəq.
S.FORM: qau cuacuay anga vaik a venateq.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa vaik a vənatəq.
S.TRANSL: After a long time she went to wash clothes.

S.FORM: manu djumaken a tsiqaw a lialiaw.
S.PHON: manu ɉumakən a ʦiqaw a ɭiaɭiaw.
S.FORM: manu djumaken a ciqaw a lialiaw.
S.PHON: manu ɉumakən a ʦiqaw a ɣiaɣiaw.
S.TRANSL: She found a lot of fish.

S.FORM: qau djameqen nimadju, sa katsu-i a tjumaq; qau sa san djamay.
S.PHON: qau ɉaməqən nimaɉu, sa kaʦu-i a cumaq; qau sa san ɉamaj.
S.FORM: qau djameqen nimadju, sa kacu-i a tjumaq; qau sa san djamay.
S.PHON: qau ɉaməqən nimaɉu, sa kaʦu-i a ʦumaq; qau sa san ɉamaj.
S.TRANSL: She caught them and took them home, and made a side dish of them.

S.FORM: qau maka kan tiamadju; mintu saqetju a tjiaɫ.
S.PHON: qau maka kan tiamaɉu; mintu saqəcu a ciaʎ.
S.FORM: qau maka kan tiamadju; mintu saqetju a tjialj.
S.PHON: qau maka kan tiamaɉu; mintu saqəʦu a ʦiaʎ.
S.TRANSL: When they had finished eating, she had stomach ache.

S.FORM: qau nusauni, "pusaladji aken a putsaqi."
S.PHON: qau nusauni, "pusaɭaɉi akən a puʦaqi."
S.FORM: qau nusauni, "pusaladji aken a pucaqi."
S.PHON: qau nusauni, "pusaɣaɉi akən a puʦaqi."
S.TRANSL: Later she said: “Come with me while I go to defecate.”

S.FORM: inika tsuay uta, "pusaladji aken a putsaqi," aya azua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: inika ʦuaj uta, "pusaɭaɉi akən a puʦaqi," aja azua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: inika cuay uta, "pusaladji aken a pucaqi," aya azua valjaw.
S.PHON: inika ʦuaj uta, "pusaɣaɉi akən a puʦaqi," aja azua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: Soon afterwards, “Come with me while I go,” said the wife.

S.FORM: manu masupil anga ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: manu masupiɭ aŋa ti sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: manu masupil anga ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: manu masupiɣ aŋa ti sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: Kidadaw got tired of this.

S.FORM: "matselaqut aken a vaik," aya ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: "maʦəɭaqut akən a vaik," aja ti sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: "macelaqut aken a vaik," aya ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: "maʦəɣaqut akən a vaik," aja ti sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: “I’m tired of going,” said Kidadaw.

S.FORM: qau vaik azua vavayan a matsidiɫ sakamaya putsaqi.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua vavajan a maʦidiʎ sakamaja puʦaqi.
S.FORM: qau vaik azua vavayan a macidilj sakamaya pucaqi.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua vavajan a maʦidiʎ sakamaja puʦaqi.
S.TRANSL: So the woman went off alone to defecate.

S.FORM: manu maka putsaqi azua vavayan.
S.PHON: manu maka puʦaqi azua vavajan.
S.FORM: manu maka pucaqi azua vavayan.
S.PHON: manu maka puʦaqi azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: When she had finished,

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaranan a tsaqi nimadju: "nu qemaqivu ti sa Kidadaw, 'aa' aya-u anga," ayain a tsaqi.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaranan a ʦaqi nimaɉu: "nu qəmaqivu ti sa kidadaw, 'aa' aja-u aŋa," ajain a ʦaqi.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaranan a caqi nimadju: "nu qemaqivu ti sa Kidadaw, 'aa' aya-u anga," ayain a caqi.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRanan a ʦaqi nimaɉu: "nu qəmaqivu ti sa kidadaw, ʔaaʔ aja-u aŋa," ajain a ʦaqi.
S.TRANSL: she said to the faeces: “When Kidadaw calls, say ‘Ah’,” she said.

S.FORM: qau timadju mavilad anga sema tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau timaɉu maviɭad aŋa səma cumaq.
S.FORM: qau timadju mavilad anga sema tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau timaɉu maviɣad aŋa səma ʦumaq.
S.TRANSL: And she ran away back to her own home.

S.FORM: qau nu qemaqivu ti sa Kidadaw, "aa," aya azua tsaqi.
S.PHON: qau nu qəmaqivu ti sa kidadaw, "aa," aja azua ʦaqi.
S.FORM: qau nu qemaqivu ti sa Kidadaw, "aa," aya azua caqi.
S.PHON: qau nu qəmaqivu ti sa kidadaw, "aa," aja azua ʦaqi.
S.TRANSL: When Kidadaw called, the faeces said “Ah”.

S.FORM: nu qaqivuin uta, "aa," aya azua tsaqi.
S.PHON: nu qaqivuin uta, "aa," aja azua ʦaqi.
S.FORM: nu qaqivuin uta, "aa," aya azua caqi.
S.PHON: nu qaqivuin uta, "aa," aja azua ʦaqi.
S.TRANSL: When he called again, it said “Ah”.

S.FORM: qaqivuin anan uta.
S.PHON: qaqivuin anan uta.
S.FORM: qaqivuin anan uta.
S.PHON: qaqivuin anan uta.
S.TRANSL: He called once more,

S.FORM: "aa," aya uta a tsaqi.
S.PHON: "aa," aja uta a ʦaqi.
S.FORM: "aa," aya uta a caqi.
S.PHON: "aa," aja uta a ʦaqi.
S.TRANSL: and again it said “Ah”.

S.FORM: qau samaɫi ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: qau samaʎi ti sa kidadaw.
S.FORM: qau samalji ti sa Kidadaw.
S.PHON: qau samaʎi ti sa kidadaw.
S.TRANSL: Kidadaw was surprised.

S.FORM: "makuda azua tsautsau?
S.PHON: "makuda azua ʦauʦau
S.FORM: "makuda azua caucau?
S.PHON: "makuda azua ʦauʦau
S.TRANSL: “What’s happened to her?

S.FORM: aku tsuay anga aravats a inika pangtjengtjez?" aya timadju.
S.PHON: aku ʦuaj aŋa aravaʦ a inika paŋcəŋcəz" aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: aku cuay anga aravac a inika pangtjengtjez?" aya timadju.
S.PHON: aku ʦuaj aŋa aRavaʦ a inika paŋʦəŋʦəz" aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: Why is she so long not coming back?” he said.

S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaikən a kiqənəc.
S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaikən a kiqənəʦ.
S.TRANSL: He went to have a look;

S.FORM: mintu avan anga tsaqi sakamaya.
S.PHON: mintu avan aŋa ʦaqi sakamaja.
S.FORM: mintu avan anga caqi sakamaya.
S.PHON: mintu avan aŋa ʦaqi sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: and there was only the faeces.

S.FORM: qau limutseng ti sa Kidadaw; siqaqeḍu tua nimadju, sa pusapui a qatsiɫay, a tsektsekan tua nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ ti sa kidadaw; siqaqəɖu tua nimaɉu, sa pusapui a qaʦiʎaj, a ʦəkʦəkan tua nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau limuceng ti sa Kidadaw; siqaqedru tua nimadju, sa pusapui a qaciljay, a cekcekan tua nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ ti sa kidadaw; siqaqəɖu tua nimaɉu, sa pusapui a qaʦiʎaj, a ʦəkʦəkan tua nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: Kidadaw was angry. With his penis in a state of erection he struck it against a stone and produced fire.
